---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# Entity { #json2vec.Entity }

```python
Entity()
```

Per-observation entity tensorfield request for local identity matching.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Entity.type) |  |
| [topk](#json2vec.Entity.topk) |  |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [check_topk](#json2vec.Entity.check_topk) |  |
| [post_bind_validate](#json2vec.Entity.post_bind_validate) |  |

### check_topk { #json2vec.Entity.check_topk }

```python
check_topk()
```



### post_bind_validate { #json2vec.Entity.post_bind_validate }

```python
post_bind_validate()
```
